sections.title: 1. `src/lib/__tests__/auth.test.ts` — Auth Layer
2. `src/utils/__tests__/waNotification.test.ts` — WhatsApp Utils
3. `src/utils/__tests__/pdfExport.test.ts` — PDF Export
4. `src/app/api/__tests__/login.test.ts` — Login API
5. Coverage per modul — prio untuk ditulis duluan
sections.content:
| Prioritas | File | Alasan |
|-----------|------|--------|
| **P0** | `src/lib/__tests__/auth.test.ts` | Semua endpoint bergantung pada auth — jika auth salah, semua endpoint salah |
| **P1** | `src/utils/__tests__/waNotification.test.ts` | External API call tanpa test → silent fail di production |
| **P2** | `src/app/api/__tests__/login.test.ts` | Integration test untuk rate limit + multi-role login |
| **P3** | `src/app/api/admin/__tests__/attendance.test.ts` | Logic approval→kehadiran upsert + WA notif trigger |
| **P4** | `src/app/api/admin/__tests__/stats.test.ts` | Division by zero, empty states, month boundary |
| **P5** | `src/app/api/recap/__tests__/recap.test.ts` | MONTH_MAP edge cases, numeric NIS sort |

sections.title: Install testing deps

codeBlocks.code:
# Install testing deps
pnpm add -D vitest @testing-library/react @testing-library/jest-dom
